summary: Iteration 14 testing complete: Online Users feature (heartbeat + online-users APIs), Community Quick Actions Bar, and Profile Daily Verse Notification Toggle. Backend 13/13 tests pass. Frontend features verified.

ui_bugs.issue: Online users section not always visible even when API returns users - intermittent 520 server errors seen during page load

action_items: Investigate intermittent 520 errors that may prevent Online Users section from loading consistently
critical_code_review_comments: Online users section only renders when onlineUsers.length > 0 - this is correct conditional rendering
NotificationService.ts correctly handles web vs mobile notification scheduling
Daily verse notification uses AsyncStorage for persistence across sessions

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All major features working, minor intermittent issue with Online Users display

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 features verified. Community page has Quick Actions Bar (readBible, quiz, Diario, groups, Dizionario). Profile page has Notifications section with 'Versetto del Giorno' toggle switch. Backend heartbeat and online-users APIs working correctly.

api_heartbeat.details: POST /api/user/heartbeat returns {status: 'ok'} with valid auth, 401 without auth

api_online_users.details: GET /api/community/online-users returns online_count and users array, works without auth

community_quick_actions_bar.details: 5 quick actions visible: readBible, quiz, Diario, groups, Dizionario

community_messages.details: Messages loading correctly, users can see and post messages

profile_notification_section.details: Notifiche section with 'Versetto del Giorno' toggle visible in profile

notification_toggle.details: Switch element present for daily verse notification toggle

notification_service_ts.details: NotificationService.ts exists with scheduleDailyVerseNotification, cancelDailyVerseNotification, isNotificationEnabled methods

screenshots_taken: /app/.screenshots/iteration14_community_after_login.png - Community page with messages and quick actions
/app/.screenshots/iteration14_profile_notifications.png - Profile page showing Notifiche section with Versetto del Giorno toggle
